title: maoutia australis
intro: Maoutia australis, also known as New Zealand tree fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Maoutia australis include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage. The health benefits of using Maoutia australis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and alleviate symptoms of allergies. Maoutia australis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in New Zealand and other parts of the world.
